data.label: libnativehelper_compat_libc++
data.description: 这个共享库和静态库仅基于公开稳定的 JNI API，包含 libnativehelper 中一部分辅助例程。它会随调用方代码一起分发，并且由于非常轻量（小于 20 KB），通常更适合静态链接。这个库的名称有些误导，因为它不包含任何 C++ 代码。

data.label: libnativehelper_compat_libc++
data.description: This shared and static library contains a subset of the helper routines in libnativehelper based only on public stable JNI APIs. It gets distributed with the caller code and is preferrably linked statically since it is very thin (less than 20 KB). The name of this library is a misnomer since it contains no C++ code.
